data.name: B-Prison Unchain
data.detailed_description:
在魔界的某個夜晚，一名盜賊潛入魔王城，本來是打算偷點財寶的，卻意外解放了被封印的傳奇夢魔阿斯莫德。

身為魔王吉拉德最忠誠的部下，米莎肩負起守護魔界與維護魔王統治的責任，必須阻止阿斯莫德的陰謀得逞。

在一場追捕中，米莎成功將阿斯莫德逼至絕境，卻在最後關頭被吉拉德阻止。為了繼續追蹤敵人，米莎不得不潛入一座名為貞潔之岩的關押魅魔的監獄。阿斯莫德利用他的變身與吸收能力藏身其中，吞噬其他囚犯來增強力量，並暗中醞釀復仇計畫。

米莎能否在為時已晚之前找出阿斯莫德的下落並阻止他呢？

在這款回合製RPG中，你將扮演米莎深入貞潔之岩監獄，一邊戰鬥一邊追踪並擊敗阿斯莫德。在冒險途中，你會結識並解救被敵人囚禁的伙伴，他們將成為你的同伴，協助米莎克服各種困難挑戰。

米莎可以使用多種技能和攻擊方式來擊敗敵人，每場戰鬥中造成的傷害都會根據她的魔法值而改變。隨著關卡推進，劇情逐步展開，挑戰也會變得更加複雜。合理規劃行動，靈活運用策略與力量，才能戰勝強敵。

戰鬥

你將面對各種各樣會使用減益效果來削弱並限制米莎行動能力的惡魔敵人。如果戰鬥失敗，會播放一段簡短的過場動畫，隨後返回關卡進度界面，你可以再次挑戰該關卡。若成功獲勝，故事將繼續推進，米莎也會離最終目標更近一步。在進入下一階段前，請務必解除所有負面狀態，以免影響後續戰鬥。 

補充力量

當魔法值大幅下降時，你可以在章節地圖中呼叫獄卒扎琪達成魔法交換的契約從而恢復魔法。在首次與扎琪相遇後，該功能將會解鎖。 

追加服裝

在首次通關劇情後，米莎的追加服裝將會在二週目解鎖，讓體驗更有新鮮感。

data.short_description: 在這款回合制RPG中，你將扮演魔界中被譽為最強戰士的米莎，為了追捕傳說中的夢魔阿斯莫德而踏上征途。在深入魅魔監獄的過程中，你需要與敵人戰鬥、招募盟友，並設法在充滿惡意的陷阱中生存下來，但是別掉以輕心哦！追擊你的敵人掌握著各種手段來阻礙你的行動。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: B-Prison Unchain
data.detailed_description:
One night in the demon world, a thief sneaks into the castle of the Demon King, seeking to steal treasure. However, the thief accidentally unleashes a legendary incubus by the name of Asmodeus.

It is now Misa's duty, as the faithful soldier under Demon King Gilad's command, to protect the realm and Lord Gilad's power over the kingdom from Asmodeus's cunning schemes.

Misa corners Asmodeus but Gilad stops her before she is about to obliterate him. Now Misa has to infiltrate Chastity Rock, a prison for succubi, and track down Asmodeus who uses his shape-shifting and absorption powers to stay hidden and grow stronger, feeding on other prisoners while plotting revenge.

Will Misa be able infiltrate the prison and find out where Asmodeus is lurking before it's too late to stop him?

In this turn-based RPG, play as Misa as she fights her way through Chastity Rock prison to track and take down Asmodeus. Meet comrades and rescue them from the bad guys so they can assist Misa in overcoming difficult challenges.

Misa uses a diverse set of skills and attacks to defeat her opponents, dealing damage proportional to her magic power level in each fight. As you progress through the levels, the story advances and the challenges become trickier to overcome. Use your wit and planning to confront enemies with ingenuity and the necessary force.

Combat

Fight all kinds of demons that use debuffs to weaken and incapacitate Misa. If you lose, you will witness a brief cutscene and return to the stage progress screen, where you can retry the same level. If you win, you progress the story and bring Misa one step closer to her goal. Be sure to remove any negative status effects before proceeding.

Replenish Strength

When magic power has dropped severely, you can replenish it by calling Warden Zaki on the Chapter map and entering a covenant of magic power exchange. Calling Warden Zaki for help will be unlocked after the first encounter.

Bonus Costume

Upon clearing the story for the first time, Misa's bonus costume will be unlocked for the next run of the story, providing additional enrichment to the replay value.

data.short_description: In this turn-based RPG, play as Misa, the supposedly strongest soldier in the Demon Realm, as she hunts down the legendary incubus Asmodeus. Battle through the succubi prison, recruit allies, and survive nasty traps, but beware! The enemies sent after you have plenty of tricks to slow you down!
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
